reviews.name: 반****
reviews.content: 두개 사는거 추천이요! 울집 강아지가 넘 좋아해요! 바스락소리도 정확해요! ( 작은 바스락소리나는 장난감 들도있잖아요! 근데 이건 커요!)
reviews.content_en: I'd recommend buying two! My pup loves them so much! The crinkly sound is spot-on too! (You know there are some toys with quiet crinkle sounds, but this one's got real volume!)

reviews.name: 류****
reviews.content:
요거 보자마자 넘 귀여워서 안살수가 없었던!!
개구리 오리 둘다 샀는데 우선 개구리 먼저 꺼내줬어요🐸
역시나 바스락거려서인지 엄청 좋아하고 신나하네요😁
삐삑이도 5군데나 있답니다ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I just couldn't resist buying it the moment I saw it - so cute!! 🐸 I got both the frog and duck, but I took out the frog first. As expected, it crinkles and my pup absolutely loves it and gets so excited 😁 And it has squeakers in 5 different spots lol

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
집에 오리인형 다른 게 있어서 개구리로 선택해서 사줬는데
애기가 너무 잘 갖고 놀아요 ㅋㅋ 바스락소리랑 삑삑 소리 좋아하는데 ㅎㅎ 아직 작은 애기라 혼자 놀 때 삑삑소리는 못 눌러요 대신 바스락 소리로 잘 놀아서 다행이에요 :)
reviews.content_en: We already had a duck toy at home so I got the frog instead, and my baby plays with it so well lol She loves the crinkly sound and the squeaky sound, but since she's still little she can't press the squeakers on her own yet. Luckily she plays well with just the crinkle sound so that works! :)

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
애가 너무너무 좋아해요.!!! 개구리 원픽입니다!!! 
머리랑 팔다리쪽은 삑삑이 있구 몸통은 바스락 거려서 애가 미챠요.!!!! ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 그리고 내구성도 생각보다 튼튼해요 인형은 사주면 하루면 조져지는데 아직 말쩡합니다 !!!!
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it so so much!!! The frog is my #1 pick!!! There are squeakers in the head and limbs and the body crinkles so my baby goes crazy!!! lol And it's way more durable than I expected. Most toys fall apart in a day, but this one's still holding up perfectly!!!!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
신상 나오자마자 이건 사야겠다 싶은 장난감이더라구요!
저희집 강아지는 바스락 소리, 삑삑이 소리나는 인형 소재를 좋아하는데 취향 저격템 등장⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
물어뜯고 놀다보면 터지는 인형들이 많았는데 터그놀이 해도 될정도로 튼튼합니다! 너무 맘에 들었는지 하루종일 안뺏기려구 들고 다니네요!
reviews.content_en: I knew I had to get this the moment the new design came out! My dog loves crinkly sounds and squeaky toy textures, so this was a total bullseye ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ A lot of toys burst when you chew on them while playing, but this one's sturdy enough for tug of war! She loves it so much she carries it around all day and won't give it up!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 요즘 바스락거리는 장난감을 좋아하는 것 같아 사봤는데 강아지가 좋아해요! 엄청 잘 가지고 놀고 삑삑이도 4개나 있어서 오랫동안 가지고 놀 수 있을 것 같아요 :)
reviews.content_en: My dog seems to like crinkly toys lately so I gave this a try, and he loves it! He plays with it all the time and since there are 4 squeakers it'll keep him entertained for a long time :)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
박스 뜯자마자 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 난리난리 
삑삑소리도 나고 비닐부스럭 소리도 나고
딱 취향저격ㅎ
reviews.content_en: The second I opened the box lol total chaos. It has squeaker sounds and that plastic crinkly sound too. Hits all the right notes!

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
삑삑이 바스락바스락 강아지가좋아하는거 다들어가있어요!
우리집 댕댕이는 신상장난감을 특히나좋아합니다 ㅎㅎㅎ
넘잘가지고놀아요 ㅎㅎ조아요
reviews.content_en: It's got all the things dogs love - squeakers and crinkle sounds! My pup especially loves new toys so she plays with it so well lol I love it

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 옴뇸뇸 애착 인형처럼 뜯다가 껴안고 졸고 그래요 던져주면 신나게 물고 오고 삑삑이 아작내는 게 취미인데 네 개라 오래 살 것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: She chews on it like a comfort toy, then hugs it and naps, and when I toss it she excitedly runs it back. Her favorite hobby is crunching on the squeakers and since there are four of them they should last a while.

reviews.content: 오리랑.개구리너무 귀여워서 둘다구매했어요 너무귀엽고 바스락바스락 튼튼합니다
reviews.content_en: Both the duck and frog are so cute I bought them both! They're adorable and super crinkly and durable

reviews.name: 수****
reviews.content: 너무 기여운 장난감 ㅠㅠ 오리도 구매할까봐요
reviews.content_en: Such a cute toy ㅠㅠ I'm thinking about buying the duck too

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 뜯자마자 자기꺼인거 아는건지 너무 좋아해요.......ㅎㅎ;
reviews.content_en: As soon as I gave it to her, she knew it was hers right away and loves it so much.......ㅎㅎ;

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 울집애기가 이것만갖구 노네요
reviews.content_en: My baby only plays with this one

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
꺅  
개구리처럼 귀여운
꺽 꺽 오리가 왔어요!
오리도 착한가격에 구매해서 너무 기분 좋은거 있죠?
뿌시럭 소리
뽁 뽁 소리 
맘에들고
특히 착한가격에 너무 너무 마음에 들어요!
바잇미 감사해요!
더욱 더 번창하세요!
reviews.content_en:
Kyaa! 🐸
A frog as cute as a frog
Croaky croaky, the duck arrived!
Got the duck at such a good price too, doesn't it just feel amazing?
Crinkly crinkly sounds
Squeak squeak sounds
I love it
Especially love it SO much for such a great price!
Thank you BITE ME!
Wishing you even more success!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
울집 강아지는 쉽게 장난감 질려하고 꽂히는거는 매일 가지고 노는데요. 현재 꽂힌거는 바잇미 칵테일 장난감이예요.
이번에는 개구리를 사줬는데 좋아하네요. 
다리 4곳에서 삑삑~ 소리나서 재미있어 하는거 같아요.
보호자도 장난감 재질좋고 귀여워서 좋고
댕댕이는 가지고 놀기 좋아하고~ 굿굿입니다. ^^
reviews.content_en: My dog gets bored of toys easily, but the one he's into, he plays with every day. Right now he's obsessed with the BITE ME cocktail toy. This time I got him a frog and he loves it. It makes squeaky sounds from all 4 legs, so he seems to have fun with it. As the owner, I love it too because the toy material is great quality and it's adorable. And my pup loves playing with it~ All good! ^^

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
개구리 개굴개굴
생각했던대로예요
아가들이 너무너무좋아해요
착한가격에 너무 잘 구매했습니다.
뿌지락 뿌지락 뽁 뽁
reviews.content_en:
Frog ribbit ribbit
It's exactly what I expected
The babies love it so so much
Got it at such a good price, really happy with this purchase.
Crinkle crinkle squeak squeak

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 요 개구리 요놈 우리 애기 단짝칭구 돼써요 ㅎㅎㅎㅎ 머리, 팔다리에 전부 삑삑이가 있고 몸통에 바스락 있어서 더 좋아하는 거 같아요 ㅠㅠ 너무 귀여워요 생긴 것도 긔얍고 완전 최고예요 !!!!!!!
reviews.content_en: This little frog became my baby's best buddy ㅎㅎㅎㅎ It has squeakers on the head and all the limbs, plus crinkly sounds in the body so he loves it even more ㅠㅠ It's so adorable. The design is just too cute and it's absolutely the best!!!!!!!!

reviews.name: Z****
reviews.content: 두개 같이 구매하면 저렴한거같아서 오리 개구리 다 샀어오요.  올 강아지 너무 좋아합니다.  어제 받아서 개구리 먼저 줬더니…. 벌써 구멍이 낫어요 안에 삑삑이가 나왔네요 휴….  위험할까봐 터진부분 삑삑이 는 짤라냈어요.   제발 좀 오래 버틸수있으면은 좋겠어요
reviews.content_en: Thought it was cheaper to buy two together so I got both the duck and frog. My pup loves them so much. Got them yesterday and gave him the frog first... and it already has a hole in it. The squeaker inside came out 😅 I was worried it might be dangerous so I cut out the squeaker from the torn part. I really hope they can last longer

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 삑삑이도 사방에 달려있고 사이즈도 큼직하니 강아지가 매우 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: Squeakers are attached all around and the size is nice and big so my dog absolutely loves it

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
개구리 오리 왕만두노즈워크 물그릇 모두 맘에들어요
디자인이 좋구 퀄리티가 좋아 선물받은 사람들이 모두 좋아해서 기분좋았어요!!
바잇미제품 너무 예쁘네요~
여의도 현백이랑 사이트포함 개구리만 20개 샀어요^^
reviews.content_en:
I love everything - the frog, duck, King Mandu nosework toy, and water bowl
The design is great and the quality is so good that everyone who received them as gifts loved them too, it made me so happy!!
BITE ME products are so pretty~
I bought 20 frogs including from Yeouido Hyunbaek and the website ^^

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 역시 비싼게 짱.. 울강쥐도 비싼신상장난감을 좋아해여.. 개구리배에서도소리나구 다리랑얼굴에서도 삑삑소리나서엄청좋아해요
reviews.content_en: You really do get what you pay for.. My hamster also loves expensive new toys.. It makes sounds from the frog's belly and squeaky sounds from the legs and face too, so she loves it so much 😊

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요 강아지 장난감 많이있어서 다른거 갖고 놀다 뜯어 주려구요 깨구리 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! There are lots of dog toys, so I'm planning to have my dog play with other ones and destroy them 😄 The frog is adorable

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 삑삑이도 많고 바스락도 엄청 크고 잘되서 엄청 좋아해요>_< 오리도 살려고요
reviews.content_en: There are lots of squeakers and the crinkle sound is super loud and works great, so my pup loves it so much >_< I'm going to get the duck too

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
바잇미 서비스 응대에 감동했습니다
장난감 귀엽고 너무 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I was impressed by BITE ME's customer service 👍 The toys are cute and I love them so much

reviews.name: 염****
reviews.content:
바스락 삑삑 두옵션이 다 들어가 있어서 
아이가 환장하고 가지고 놀아요ㅋㅋㅋ
개구리 골병들겠어요(?)
reviews.content_en: Since it has both the crinkle and squeaker options, my pup goes absolutely crazy playing with it ㅋㅋㅋ The frog is going to get played to death(?) 😂

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content: 신상 나왔길래 하나 겟 했습니다! 부시럭 소리 + 삑삑이 소리 다 나서 강아지가 엄청 잘 갖고 놀아요! 배송도 하루만에 왔고 넘 귀여워서 개구리도 사려구요ㅎ
reviews.content_en: A new product came out so I grabbed one! It makes both crinkle and squeaker sounds, so my dog plays with it like crazy! It arrived in just one day and it's so adorable that I'm thinking of getting the frog too ㅎ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 개구리 장난감 너무 귀엽고 삑삑이랑 바스락 둘다 있어서 좋아요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The frog toy is so cute and I love that it has both the squeaker and crinkle sounds ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
울 애기가 넘 조아라하네요
삑삑이가 네군데나 들어있어 더 좋은거 같아요
캐릭터도 귀엽고 견주나 강아지나 다 만족합니다
reviews.content_en: My baby absolutely loves it 🐕 It's even better because it has 4 squeakers inside! The character is cute too and both the dog parent and pup are totally satisfied

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 개구리를 개인적으로 좋아하...기때문에 신상 장난감 못참고 사버렸어요 ㅋㅋㅋ 장난감을 신날때 아님 안가지고 노는 아이지만.. 장난감은 개인적인 제 만족이라.. 너무 좋아요!!!! 귀여워! 짜릿해!!
reviews.content_en: I personally love frogs... so I couldn't resist and just bought the new toy ㅋㅋㅋ My pup doesn't usually play with toys unless she's in the mood, but... this toy is my personal satisfaction, so I absolutely love it!!!! It's so cute! It's thrilling!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
너무 귀엽고 촉감도 좋아요
세탁해서 빨리 주고 싶어요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and feels nice to the touch 😊 I want to wash it and give it back to my pup quickly

reviews.name: Y****
reviews.content: 배홍 빠른고 상품 넘 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: Fast delivery and the product is so cute! 🥰

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 애가 어딜가던 물고다녀요! 바스락거리는 소리가 나서 놀라서 쳐다보면 이 인형이랑 놀고있는거더라구요
reviews.content_en: My pup takes this everywhere and chews on it! When I hear the crinkly sound and look over, sure enough he's playing with this toy 😄

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 우리집 강아지가 애기때부터 삑삑 소리나는 장난감을 좋아했는데 이 개구리 장난감을 본 순간 바로 결제 했어요. 너무 귀여워서 제가 갖고 싶네요😄
reviews.content_en: My dog has loved squeaky toys since she was a puppy, and the moment I saw this frog toy I bought it right away. It's so adorable I want to keep it for myself! 😄

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content: 울 아가 생일선물로 구매! 너무 귀엽고 바스락도 최고지믄 삑삑이가 사방팔방으로 있어 아주 삑삑이 러버인 저희 강아지는 좋아서 미칠라하네요
reviews.content_en: Got it as a birthday gift for my pup! It's super cute and the crinkle sound is amazing, plus there are squeakers all over the place—my dog is absolutely obsessed with squeaky toys and he's going crazy over this one 🐶

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 딱보자마자 저희 애기가.좋아할것같아.바로 구매했는데 역시나 엄청 좋아하고.잘가지고 놀아요 정말 잘산것같아요 오리도 구매하고 싶네욤
reviews.content_en: I thought my baby would like it right away and bought it immediately—and sure enough, he loves it and plays with it all the time. Great purchase! I want to get the duck version too! 🦆

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 강아지한테 장난감을 더 사주고 싶어서 어떤걸로 살까 고민하다가 장난감이 오리/개구리 모양이란 너무 귀엽고 바스락/삑삑 소리가 난다길래 구매했어요 강아지가 잘 갖고 노는 거 같아서 사주길 잘했네요
reviews.content_en: I was trying to figure out what toy to get my dog, and when I saw these were shaped like a duck and frog with crinkle and squeaky sounds, I had to get it! My dog seems to really enjoy playing with it, so I'm glad I made the purchase 😊

reviews.name: 갱****
reviews.content:
꾸질꾸질 오리가와썽요 이마에 점도 두개 났꼬요
바스락 소리는 완전 잘나서 미치고 환장해요
reviews.content_en: The duck arrived kind of dirty with even a couple of spots on its forehead 😅 But the crinkle sound is absolutely fantastic—I'm obsessed with it!

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 장난감들이 다 특성이 있고 개성넘쳐서 좋아요. 저희 강아지가 너무 좋아하고 잘 물어뜯고 놀아요.
reviews.content_en: Each toy has its own unique character and personality, which is great. My dog loves them and really enjoys chewing and playing with them.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
우리 아기가 아주 좋아해요* 환장하네요
물어뜯어도 인형 탄탄해서 안 떨어져요! 대박👍🏻
reviews.content_en: My pup absolutely loves it! He's obsessed 🐕 Even with all the chewing, the toy is so sturdy it doesn't fall apart! Amazing! 👍🏻

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 색감도 좋고 귀엽네요. 아이도 좋아합니다.
reviews.content_en: The colors are nice and it's cute. My dog likes it too! 🐶

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여운거 아니에용??? 너무 좋아할거같어요!!!!
reviews.content_en: Isn't it just so cute??? I think my pup is going to love it!!!!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
개구리 진짜 귀여워요ㅎㅎ
그리고 너무 좋아해요!!
reviews.content_en:
The frog is so cute hehe
And my dog loves it so much!!

reviews.content: 개구리 너무귀여워서 재구매합니다
reviews.content_en: The frog is too cute, so I'm buying it again

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content: 재구매예요 ㅎㅎ 처음에 개구리1개 샀는데 너무귀여워서ㅠㅠ 오리하나사고 지인강아지선물용개구리 추가했어용
reviews.content_en: It's a repurchase hehe At first I bought 1 frog but it was so cute that I cried, so I got a duck and added a frog as a gift for my friend's dog too

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 하루만에 눈이 날라갓지만 애기가 너무 좋아해요 ㅎㅎ 삑삑이는 시끄러워서 밤에 안주는데 이거는 삑삑이 소리도 작고 바스락거리는 소리가 좋아요! 삑삑이장난감이 최애라 소리큰 삑삑이 대용으로 주고잇어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The eye fell off in just a day but my baby loves it so much hehe I don't give squeaky toys at night because they're too loud, but this one has a quieter squeaky sound and I love the crinkly noise! Since my pup's favorite toy is squeaky ones, I'm using this as a substitute for loud squeaky toys hehe

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content: 개구리 너무 귀엽고 잘가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: The frog is so cute and my dog plays with it really well

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무귀여워요 ㅎ 애기가 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute hehe My baby loves it

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
골라갖고 놀으라고 오리랑 개구리 둘 다 구매했는데 오리만 좋아하고 개구리는 눈길도 안 줘요ㅜㅜㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ개구리도 놀아줘라...
어딜 물어도 삑삑거리고 바스락거리니까 아주 환장합니다ㅎ 10분도 안돼서 오리는 침 범벅....
reviews.content_en:
I bought both a duck and a frog so they could choose what to play with, but my dog only likes the duck and won't even look at the frog ㅜㅜㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ play with the frog too...
No matter where you bite it, it squeaks and crinkles so it's absolutely driving my dog crazy hehe In less than 10 minutes the duck is covered in drool....

reviews.name: 인****
reviews.content: 노견이라 새로운 걸 사줘도 금방 흥미가 떨어지는데 이건 매일 갖고 놀아요!ㅋㅋ부메랑처럼 던져도 소리가 안 나서 층간소음 걱정도 없어요. 다음엔 오리도 사주려고요!
reviews.content_en: My senior dog usually loses interest in new toys quickly, but she plays with this one every day! ㅋㅋ It doesn't make noise even when thrown like a boomerang, so I don't have to worry about noise complaints from downstairs neighbors. Next time I'm planning to get the duck too!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 엄청좋아해요 터그놀이 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: My dog loves it so much! He loves tug of war with it
